description: Canonical AD domain preconditions catalog for privilege relationship mapping, credential-hint normalization, weak password policy, AS-REP baseline exposure, Kerberoast baseline exposure, LAPS baseline coverage, AD-22 baseline tiering posture, and delegation posture-core (AD-06/AD-08) slices (Phases 7A, 7C, 7D, 7F, 7G, 7I, 7L, and 7P).

AD-PR-01.label: privileged_groups_enumerated
AD-PR-01.description: Privileged AD groups are present in the inventory snapshot.
AD-PR-01.evidence_hint: Group inventory includes names matching configured privileged-group aliases.

AD-PR-02.label: privileged_group_memberships_present
AD-PR-02.description: At least one membership edge targets a privileged AD group.
AD-PR-02.evidence_hint: Group inventory provides non-empty member lists for privileged groups.

AD-PR-03.label: enabled_human_privileged_members_present
AD-PR-03.description: At least one enabled non-machine user is assigned to a privileged AD group.
AD-PR-03.evidence_hint: Membership object IDs resolve to enabled user accounts not ending with '$'.

AD-CH-01.label: credential_hints_in_descriptions_present
AD-CH-01.description: At least one AD account description contains credential-hint text patterns.
AD-CH-01.evidence_hint: Description text contains configured credential keywords (password/passwd/pwd/secret/etc).

AD-CH-02.label: enabled_non_machine_credential_hints_present
AD-CH-02.description: At least one enabled non-machine account contains credential-hint text in its description.
AD-CH-02.evidence_hint: Credential-hint findings resolve to enabled non-machine principals.

AD-WP-01.label: password_policy_snapshot_observed
AD-WP-01.description: Domain password policy attributes are present in the observed AD policy snapshot.
AD-WP-01.evidence_hint: Domain policy includes minimum password length attributes.

AD-WP-02.label: weak_minimum_password_length_present
AD-WP-02.description: One or more observed domains have minimum password length below configured security threshold.
AD-WP-02.evidence_hint: Observed minimum password length is less than configured threshold (default: 12).

AD-AS-01.label: user_preauth_state_observed
AD-AS-01.description: AD user inventory includes pre-authentication state required for AS-REP exposure assessment.
AD-AS-01.evidence_hint: User inventory includes dontreqpreauth and/or userAccountControl fields.

AD-AS-02.label: asrep_roastable_accounts_present
AD-AS-02.description: Enabled user accounts with pre-authentication disabled are present.
AD-AS-02.evidence_hint: Enabled user records have dontreqpreauth=true or UAC DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH bit set.

AD-KR-01.label: kerberoastable_accounts_present
AD-KR-01.description: Enabled SPN-linked user accounts are present for Kerberoast baseline exposure assessment.
AD-KR-01.evidence_hint: Enabled user records contain SPNs or hasspn=true (machine accounts optionally excluded by policy).

AD-KR-02.label: kerberoastable_rc4_permitted_accounts_present
AD-KR-02.description: Kerberoastable accounts indicate RC4-permitted encryption behavior.
AD-KR-02.evidence_hint: Kerberoastable account encryption types are not AES-only.

AD-LP-01.label: laps_baseline_candidate_hosts_observed
AD-LP-01.description: Enabled non-DC computer inventory is observed for LAPS baseline coverage assessment.
AD-LP-01.evidence_hint: Computer inventory includes enabled non-DC records from BloodHound/LDAP snapshots.

AD-LP-02.label: non_dc_hosts_without_laps_present
AD-LP-02.description: One or more enabled non-DC computer accounts indicate missing LAPS coverage.
AD-LP-02.evidence_hint: Explicit haslaps=false or missing LAPS password attributes on observed non-DC computers.

AD-06.label: unconstrained_delegation_non_dc
AD-06.description: Enabled non-domain-controller principals with unconstrained delegation are present in observed AD delegation posture input.
AD-06.evidence_hint: Canonical delegation sidecar reports one or more unconstrained non-DC hosts.

AD-08.label: constrained_delegation_protocol_transition
AD-08.description: Enabled principals with protocol-transition constrained delegation are present in observed AD delegation posture input.
AD-08.evidence_hint: Canonical delegation sidecar reports principals with trusted_to_auth_for_delegation and non-empty allowed_to_delegate.

AD-TI-01.label: privileged_session_tiering_observation_present
AD-TI-01.description: Canonical AD-22 tiering sidecar input is observed for the workload.
AD-TI-01.evidence_hint: Runtime emits canonical sidecar (`ad22_tiering_input.json`) with schema `skg.ad.tiering_input.v1`.

AD-22.label: no_privileged_account_tiering
AD-22.description: Privileged sessions are present on non-tier-0 systems, indicating baseline tiering posture failure.
AD-22.evidence_hint: Canonical AD-22 sidecar summary reports non-tier0 privileged sessions.

ad_privilege_relationship_mapping_v1.description: Directory privilege relationships are present and mappable from inventory snapshots.

ad_human_admin_assignment_v1.description: Enabled human principals are assigned directly to privileged AD groups.

ad_password_hint_exposure_v1.description: Credential-hint text appears in AD account descriptions, including enabled non-machine accounts.

ad_weak_password_policy_v1.description: Observed AD domain password policy allows minimum length below the configured threshold.

ad_asrep_exposure_baseline_v1.description: Observed AD user inventory indicates whether enabled users with pre-authentication disabled are present.

ad_kerberoast_exposure_baseline_v1.description: Observed AD user inventory indicates whether enabled SPN-linked accounts exist and permit RC4-oriented Kerberoast baseline exposure.

ad_laps_coverage_baseline_v1.description: Observed AD computer inventory indicates whether enabled non-DC hosts lack LAPS baseline coverage.

ad_delegation_posture_baseline_v1.description: Observed canonical delegation sidecar indicates whether AD-06 unconstrained non-DC delegation posture and AD-08 protocol-transition constrained delegation posture are present.

ad_privileged_session_tiering_baseline_v.description: Observed canonical AD-22 sidecar indicates whether privileged sessions occur on non-tier-0 systems.
